gate.class: P7 (the director gate v1 reserved for a victory; fired for the first time on B-1's powered win)
gate.decision: publish all five seed adapters with the claim tied to the all-seeds mean
gate.authorized_by: director, explicit chat decision 2026-07-11, taken with the B-1 result in view
gate.claim_binding: all-seeds mean 0.678 -> 0.890 on tool_inspected (B-1, 36-record preregistered cohort); per-seed numbers disclosed on the card; no best-of-seeds

artifacts.source: experiments/finetune-arc-v1/artifacts/pod{A,B}/adapters-seed*.tar.gz (the frozen v1 archives; gguf/adapters sha-pinned by p4-receipt.json + artifacts.sha256)
artifacts.published_content: each seed's SELECTED epoch only (the checkpoint the sealed evals ran), PEFT format, per-seed subfolder + model card

huggingface.pushed_from: local rig, org-scoped token supplied by the director at publish time (value never logged, echoed, or committed)
huggingface.verified_live: card renders with all five seeds, base model Qwen/Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct, the all-seeds-mean claim, and the CC-BY-SA-3.0 share-alike chain

github_mirror.note: byte-identical staging archive; doubles as the GitHub mirror of the frozen artifacts. A relay workflow (.github/workflows/push-adapters-hf.yml) can re-push it to HF from CI with the org-scoped secret if the rig path is ever unavailable.

evaluation_of_record.preregistration: experiments/finetune-arc-v2/P0-LOCK.md (commit c9dcd17, frozen before any model call)
evaluation_of_record.verdict: powered win — 29/36 paired wins (2 ties) vs the ex-ante bar 24/34; sign p = 0.000039; never-trained stratum 10/12 (p = 0.039); prose-only controls remain below baseline and the claim does not extend to them

compensators.undo: delete or flip private from the HF UI + retraction note in the card and the B-1 report
gh release delete jam-ft-v1-adapters --yes (tag delete included)
git revert of the docs commit
